text_block_list.text:
Stay Gold did not appear to be in the 
best condition, so I brought her to the 
infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Sorry about this, Trainer. You brought 
me all this way even though there's 
nothing to worry about.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I see. Well, one could never be too 
careful. I'll behave and get a little 
rest here then.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yeah, good night, Trainer

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hm……? This is……

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…It's familiar, yet unfamiliar. 
An enigmatic feeling.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
(Despite looking quite similar to a place 
I've visited before, it appears to be 
somewhere different)

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
……Well, sure. As long as there's a road 
ahead of us, then it's time to get walking.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
(No matter how far I go, this barren 
landscape seems to continue forever)

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
It appears that this is a maze with no exit. 
Now then, what should we do, Trai——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …Woah there. Haha, you surprised me now. I didn't realise this has become a habit of mine.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: But this clears things up.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Are you the overseer of this "dream"? 
I feel as though this scenery is about to 
engulf me, could you help me get out?

text_block_list.name: Tall Dark Shadow
text_block_list.text: —— The Unknown ——

text_block_list.name: Tall Dark Shadow
text_block_list.text: Choose. The right is a future that carries on because you discarded the past. The left is a future that idles while you cradle the past.

text_block_list.name: Tall Dark Shadow
text_block_list.text: Choose your Unknown.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Then this is my choice. I will advance, 
right through to the heart of my future 
——all while I continue to I embrace 
my past.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Are you telling me to forget, to give up? 
You are not the one who makes my 
decisions for me. I go exactly 
where I want to go.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
No matter how vast and barren the land 
is ahead, because I have my companions 
with me, there is nothing we cannot 
tread through together.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hahah, to think something like that exists within me. This confrontation has left me feeling surprisingly refreshed.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
——I'll take on anything that comes 
my way, because this is the path I 
chose for myself.
